creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
For head -r358966 it builds fine with no
patch to the Makefile and the .meta file
shows no use of qdivrem.o or udivdi3.o 
for such a build. This is true for both
32-bit powerpc and for powerpc64 in my
tests.

I do not know when the change occurred,
but I'm closing this as fixed.
